name:
EASTER VIGIL
IN THE HOLY NIGHT

lectionary.gospelTitle: The Women Find the Tomb Empty (Lk 24:1-12)
lectionary.thematicTag: Easter Vigil — In the Holy Night

readings.summary: The Lord calls and will make a lasting covenant.
The Lord returns the people to their land.
The women find the tomb empty.

planningNotes: SAT 7 PM — Easter Vigil, all ensembles combined
Procession with Paschal Candle; Exultet; Service of Readings; Baptismal Liturgy; Liturgy of the Eucharist
First Alleluia of Easter sung after Epistle (Rom 6:3-11)
Litany of Saints during procession to font
Neophytes receive Eucharist for first time
Procession of Candle: Lumen de Lumine (Berthier/Taize, adapt. Ed Archer, Choral Dir: Tica)
Exultet: This Is the Night (Tony Alonso, Choral Dir: Arielle)
Reading 1 (Gen 1:1-2:2) Musical Setting: Genesis Reading for the Great Vigil (Rory Cooney, SATB, Choral Dir: Tica)
Reading 2 (Ex 14:15-15:1) Musical Setting: Exodus Reading Acclamation (Fr. Jerome Kaywell, SATB)
Reading 3 (Is 55:1-11) — no musical element during reading
Canticle: Is 12:2-3, 4, 5-6 You Will Draw Water (Ed Archer, SATB, BPM 112, Choral Dir: Tica)
Gloria: Glory to God from Mass of Joy & Peace (Tony Alonso, arr. Dan Houze, BPM 124)
Epistle: Rom 6:3-11 — The Lord returns the people to their land
Psalm 118: Refrain from Mass of New Beginnings (Clifford Petty, verses adapt. David Lockwood, BPM 138, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Reprise of Gospel Acclamation after Gospel (Lk 24:1-12)
Homily Song: You Say (Lauren Daigle, arr. Dan Galbraith, BPM 74, keys of F or G available)
Litany of the Saints (Tony Alonso, SATB, BPM 98)
Baptismal Acclamation: Springs of Water (Petty, adapt. Lockwood, BPM 120, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Acclamation for Baptisms: Gospel Acclamation from Mass of New Beginnings (Petty, BPM 138, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Sprinkling: Lead Us to the Water (Kendzia & Daigle, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Anointing: Veni Sancte Spiritus (Christopher Walker, Choral Dir: Tica)
Communion: I Am the Bread of Life (SAT, BPM 80, Choral Dir: Tica)
Meditation: Sunday Is Coming (BPM 80, Choral Dir: Arielle)
Sending: Hallelujah Chorus (Handel, SATB, BPM 100, Choral Dir: Tica)

massNotes: SAT 7 PM — Easter Vigil, all ensembles combined
Procession: Lumen de Lumine (Berthier/Taizé, adapt. Ed Archer)
Exultet: This Is the Night (Tony Alonso)
Homily Song: You Say (Lauren Daigle, arr. Dan Galbraith, BPM 74)
Litany of the Saints (Tony Alonso, BPM 98)
Baptismal Acclamation: Springs of Water (Clifford Petty, adapt. David Lockwood, BPM 120)
Acclamation for Baptisms: Gospel Acclamation from Mass of New Beginnings (Petty, BPM 138)
Sprinkling: Lead Us to the Water (Tom Kendzia & Gary Daigle)

gloria.title: Glory to God from Mass of Joy & Peace

gospelAcclamation.title: Gospel Acclamation from Mass of New Beginnings

communionSongs.title: I Am the Bread of Life
